subcodes.first_line: O my God! Thou seest the tempests assailing with violence, and the storms breaking the very backbones. O Lord! The straits have grown dire [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تری یا الهی العواصف قاصفه للظهور و القواصف قاصمه للاصلاب و الازور رب قد ضاقت
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @spiritual transformation, @prayer for the departed, @soul; spirit after death, @consolation and comfort
